hooks.command: case "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" in */Users/parkchanghyeon/github/claude-code-lab/*) ;; *) exit 0;; esac; branch=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null); if [ "$branch" = "main" ] || [ "$branch" = "master" ]; then echo "BLOCKED: You're on '$branch'. Create a worktree first: git worktree add ../<feature-name> -b <feature-name> main" >&2; exit 2; fi

branch=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null); if [ "$branch" = "main" ] || [ "$branch" = "master" ]; then case "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" in *'git commit'*|*'git push'*|*'git merge'*|*'git rebase'*|*'git cherry-pick'*|*'git reset'*|*'git stash pop'*|*'git stash apply'*) echo "BLOCKED: Destructive git operation on '$branch'. Create a worktree first: git worktree add ../<feature-name> -b <feature-name> main" >&2; exit 2;; esac; fi
